mapper.select:
SELECT DISTINCT md.code FROM user_groups ug JOIN users u ON u.id = ug.user_id AND u.is_active = 1
JOIN user_hospitals uh ON uh.user_id = u.id AND uh.hospital_id = #{hospitalId} AND uh.is_active = 1
JOIN roles r ON r.id = ug.role_id JOIN role_module_details rmd ON rmd.role_id = r.id JOIN module_details md ON md.id = rmd.module_detail_id WHERE ug.user_id = #{userId} AND ug.is_active = 1 AND r.is_active = 1 AND md.is_active = 1

SELECT mt.id AS moduleTypeId, mt.public_id::text AS moduleTypePublicKey, mt.code AS moduleTypeCode, mt.name AS moduleTypeName, mt.name_other AS moduleTypeNameOther, mt.display_order AS moduleTypeOrder, m.id AS moduleId, m.public_id::text AS modulePublicKey, m.code AS moduleCode, m.name AS moduleName, m.display_order AS moduleOrder, md.id AS moduleDetailId, md.public_id::text AS moduleDetailPublicKey, md.code AS code, md.action_key AS "actionKey", md.display_order AS "orderNo", md.name AS moduleDetailName, md.name_other AS moduleDetailNameOther, md.type AS moduleDetailType, CASE WHEN rmd.module_detail_id IS NULL THEN FALSE ELSE TRUE END AS checked FROM module_types mt JOIN modules m ON m.module_type_id = mt.id AND m.is_active = 1 JOIN module_details md ON md.module_id = m.id AND md.is_active = 1 LEFT JOIN role_module_details rmd ON rmd.module_detail_id = md.id AND rmd.role_id = #{roleId} WHERE mt.is_active = 1 ORDER BY mt.display_order, mt.id, m.display_order, m.id, md.display_order, md.id

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT md.id) FROM module_details md WHERE md.is_active = 1 AND md.id IN
#{moduleDetailId}
